scripts.start: concurrently -n gateway,identity,job,applicant,worker,screening,notify -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgWhite.bold,bgRed.bold,bgYellow.bold" "npm run start -w @umurava/api-gateway" "npm run start -w @umurava/identity-service" "npm run start -w @umurava/job-service" "npm run start -w @umurava/applicant-service" "npm run start -w @umurava/worker-service" "npm run start -w @umurava/screening-service" "npm run start -w @umurava/notification-service"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,identity,job,applicant,worker,screening,notify -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgWhite.bold,bgRed.bold,bgYellow.bold" "tsx watch --env-file .env apps/api-gateway/src/index.ts" "tsx watch --env-file .env apps/identity-service/src/index.ts" "tsx watch --env-file .env apps/job-service/src/index.ts" "tsx watch --env-file .env apps/applicant-service/src/index.ts" "tsx watch --env-file .env apps/worker-service/src/index.ts" "tsx watch --env-file .env apps/screening-service/src/index.ts" "tsx watch --env-file .env apps/notification-service/src/index.ts"
